title: Structured Argument Extraction
learning_outcomes: Explain JSON Schema constraints in tool calling.
Formulate logit bias modifications for argument syntax.

content_sections.title: JSON Schema Constraints
content_sections.content: To interface with external APIs, agents must extract structured arguments from text. This is configured by passing a JSON Schema defining parameter names, types, and constraint rules. The model output is parsed into these fields, validating argument types before execution.
